reported_entities.name: Delta Electronics, Inc.
reported_entities.claim: 台達電子 refers to Delta Electronics, Inc., the Taiwan parent company headquartered in Taipei, founded 1971, listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE: 2308). This is the primary/official English name for the queried Chinese term.

reported_entities.name: Delta Electronics (Thailand) Public Company Limited
reported_entities.claim: A separately-listed subsidiary of the Taiwan parent, publicly traded on the Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET: DELTA / Bloomberg DELTA:TB). Distinct legal entity from the Taiwan parent company (Delta Electronics, Inc.) and should not be conflated with it when resolving 台達電子.

notes: 台達電子 (or 台達電) unambiguously resolves to Delta Electronics, Inc., the Taiwan-headquartered parent company (TWSE: 2308), official Chinese registered name 台達電子工業股份有限公司. Delta Electronics (Thailand) PCL is a separate, independently SET-listed subsidiary entity and is NOT the correct referent for a bare '台達電子' query -- it would only be the intended target if the query specifically mentioned Thailand or a Thai stock ticker. Confirmed via 2 WebSearch queries; did not need WebFetch as search snippets were sufficient and consistent across Wikipedia, official deltaww.com, and Thai SET/Bloomberg sources.
